body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

body.title: Network Time Security for the Network Time Protocol
Enterprise Profile for the Precision Time Protocol With Mixed Multicast and Unicast messages
1588 Status Update and Report from informal NTP/PTP discussion

document that marav is that we're putting forward on PTP ntp over PTP so those are the three things that are currently ongoing in 1588 that might be of interest um we did have a informal meeting last um 1588 specifications are also relevant here uh so the next steps are to report back to both the 1588 and the iatf ntp work uh groups um this is the report back for you all we'll send some more DET
